title: Jinda (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jinda''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Jinda]]''', a [[Sentience|sentient]] [[species]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Jinda/Legends|Jinda]]''', a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*'''[[Jinda (Ewok)|Jinda]]''', a condescending nickname used by village-dwelling [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] to insult nomadic Ewoks, comparing their habits to those of the Jinda species
*'''[[Jinda Dancers]]'''
*'''[[Jinda percussion instrument]]'''
*'''[[Jinda Ritualist's Cave]]'''
*'''[[Jinda string instrument]]'''
*'''[[Jinda system/Legends|Jinda system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]
*'''[[Jinda wind instrument]]'''
*'''[[Travelling Jindas]]''', a tribe of Jindas living on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]

==Real world==
*"'''[[The Curse of the Jindas]]'''"
*"'''[[The Travelling Jindas]]'''"
